slides.title: The longevity habit hiding *at the sink*.
slides.sub: Washing your hands is not just about today's cold. Over a lifetime it may protect how you age.

slides.title: Every infection leaves a mark
slides.body: Each cold, flu or stomach bug sets off a wave of *systemic inflammation*. One is harmless. A lifetime of them adds up.

slides.title: Meet inflammaging
slides.body: Chronic, low-grade inflammation that builds with age *is linked to* faster decline. Researchers call this slow burn inflammaging.

slides.title: Fewer infections, lower load
slides.body: Lowering your lifetime infectious load *may ease* that constant inflammatory pressure on the body over the decades.

slides.title: Clean hands, simple math
slides.body: Regular handwashing can cut how often you catch something. Twenty seconds with soap *is quietly powerful* protection.

slides.title: A more resilient immune system
slides.body: Fewer infections over a lifetime can support an immune system that *stays resilient* as you get older.

slides.title: Small habits, *tracked daily*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns the everyday choices that protect your immune health, sleep, food, movement and steps, into one clear daily Health Score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The simplest longevity habit might be the one at your bathroom sink. 🌿🧼

Every infection spikes inflammation, and a lifetime of them can fuel inflammaging. Regular handwashing lowers that load and may keep your immune system resilient with age. Save this. 🔖
